title: God of War Tridents
description: Replace your trident with multiple optional weapons. Replaces models, textures, sound effects and makes the trident entity animated. Inspired by the famous video game, God of War. Works with OptiFine, or CIT Resewn + Custom Entity Models mod.
body:
![God of War Tridents](https://i.imgur.com/Z1SG3IA.png)
# God of War Tridents
A **collection** of *resource packs*, inspired by the famous video game, **God of War**!

### [Check out the showcase video ***here***!]

## (Requires: OptiFine, 1.19+ and a Shader [internal works too!])

### Some useful tips before submitting your bug reports:
- Make sure you have the proper version of OptiFine installed for the appropriate version you're playing on.
- Go to Options -> Video Settings -> Quality, and make sure Custom Entity Models is turned on!

## You can:

- Showcase the resource pack in any format if you credit me.
- Share the resource pack with the Modrinth link.
- Use the resource pack on any server.
- Modify the resource pack for private use only!

## You can't:

- Claim the resource pack as your own.
- Modify the resource pack for public use.
- Reupload any contents of the resource pack to anywhere.
- Showcase or share the resource pack without properly crediting the author.

### WARNING: If you disregard ANY of the above statements, measures will be taken to prevent any kind of theft! Thank you for understanding.

## About

As the name suggests, this resource pack replaces the trident, the sound effects of the trident, and has extra "reactive" animations.

### Leviathan Axe Reactivity:
- When the weapon is **thrown**, the **runes light up**.
- When the weapon is in your **hand** and you are in **rain / water**, the **runes light up**.
- When the weapon is **thrown**, a *contrail* effect appears behind the weapon. Once it **lands**, both the rune and contrail effects disappear.
- When the weapon is **impaled into an object**, and is in **rain / water**, a **glowing effect** appears around the handle (provides **better visibility underwater** if you throw your weapon and it can't return).

### Mjolnir Reactivity:
- When the weapon is **thrown**, the **runes light up**.
- When the weapon is in your **hand** and you are in **rain / water**, the **runes light up**.
- When the weapon is **thrown**, a *lightning* effect appears around the handle and it will leave a big lightning trail behind the hammer. Once it **lands**, both the rune and contrail effects disappear.
- When the weapon is **impaled into an object**, and is in **rain / water**, a **lightning effect** appears around the handle (provides **better visibility underwater** if you throw your weapon and it can't return).

The **runes** and **effects** have *emissive textures*, meaning they will be **glowing** in the dark areas (**does not emit light level!**)

### WARNING: If you play in another language other than English (US), the following changes are NOT gonna be applied:

## Renamed stuff in-game
As an extra feature I've renamed the trident enchantments and the trident itself, so it fits the lore aspects of God of War.

### Leviathan Axe

- Trident renamed to ***"Axe"***.

**Enchantment renames:**

- Impaling = Strength
- Loyalty = Recall
- Riptide = Frozen Whirlwind
- Channeling = Lightning Grip

### Mjolnir

- Trident renamed to ***"Hammer"***.

**Enchantment renames:**

- Impaling = Strength
- Loyalty = Recall
- Riptide = Lightning Dash
- Channeling = Lightning

## Extra Credits
- Model, texture and animation by **Szombie**.
- The sound effects were originally made by **Sony's Santa Monica Studio's** ***God of War*** **Sound Design Team**! These were *edited to fit Minecraft* by **Szombie**.

## THANK YOU!

A lot of love, time and effort was put into this work. The weapons are carefully crafted to make ***You*** have the ***best experience*** when playing!

If you would like to **support** me, please consider **subscribing** to my **YouTube** channel for more content like this in the future! You also have the option to **donate** me on **PayPal**!

### I really hope you'll enjoy the resource pack! Have fun, Godslayer!

[Check out the showcase video ***here***!]: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zV2k2DtuB20
